ExpSyntax.val: IF( Trim({0,51})=Trim({0,46}) AND Trim({0,52})=Trim({0,47}) AND Trim({0,53})=Trim({0,48}) AND Trim({0,54})=Trim({0,49}) AND Trim({0,55})=Trim({0,50}), 'black','blue')
IF( Trim({0,61})=Trim({0,56}) AND Trim({0,62})=Trim({0,57}) AND Trim({0,63})=Trim({0,58}) AND Trim({0,64})=Trim({0,59}) AND Trim({0,65})=Trim({0,60}), 'black','blue')

Header.Description: Create contact type list in html

SQL_STMT_U.val: SELECT ContactTypeDescription FROM CDS_ContactTypeRepository WHERE EffectiveFrom <=':1' AND EffectiveEnd > ':2' AND Display = 'Y' AND ContactTypeId IN (:3) ORDER BY DisplayOrder

FormName.valUnicode: Create contact type list in html

Header.Description: Create contact type list in html

SQL_STMT_U.val: SELECT ContactTypeDescription FROM CDS_ContactTypeRepository WHERE EffectiveFrom <=':1' AND EffectiveEnd > ':2' AND Display = 'Y' AND ContactTypeId IN (:3) ORDER BY DisplayOrder

Header.Description: Create contact type list in html

SQL_STMT_U.val: SELECT ContactTypeDescription FROM CDS_ContactTypeRepository WHERE EffectiveFrom <=':1' AND EffectiveEnd > ':2' AND Display = 'Y' AND ContactTypeId IN (:3) ORDER BY DisplayOrder
